image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about lidar mapping than social media does.
Context visual: Lidar mapping uses lasers to measure distances, creating precise 3D models of our world.
Escalation visual: But, did you know it can reveal hidden structures beneath dense forests?
Evidence visual: Research shows lidar mapping uncovers ancient ruins, even in the Amazon!
Payoff visual: This technology helps us see the unseen, reshaping archaeology and conservation efforts.
Cta visual: Curious about more tech innovations? Hit that like button and subscribe!
